steps.title: Use the evidence after the colon
steps.content: The colon explains why Juarez was a major figure: he was Mexico's first president from an Indigenous community and had many significant accomplishments during a long tenure.

steps.title: Choose the fitting description
steps.content: Choice A is about unpredictability, which is not discussed. Choice B matches the historic role and significant accomplishments. Choice C suggests secrecy, which is unsupported. Choice D contradicts the passage's emphasis on significance. The answer is B.
